mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auction_inquiry ( auction_id, writer_id, answerer_id, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{auctionId}, #{writerId}, #{answererId}, #{content}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, auction_id AS auctionId, writer_id AS writerId, answerer_id AS answererId, content, answer, status, answered_at AS answeredAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM auction_inquiry WHERE id = #{id}
